# PII Checklist

## Inventory Review

- Are major personal-data fields and flows documented?
- Are sensitive categories separated from ordinary identifiers?
- Are free-text and upload surfaces considered?

## Exposure Review

- Are logs and analytics protected from raw personal data?
- Are admin and support tools showing only necessary detail?
- Are third-party integrations receiving the minimum needed fields?

## Control Review

- Are masking and redaction rules explicit?
- Is raw-value access role-limited and auditable?
- Are leakage tests or periodic reviews in place?
